description: Square 'GANG ARREST' card. The base is a blurry photograph of a bald, gray-bearded older man standing indoors wearing a dark shirt with a yellow lanyard; the back of another person in a gray shirt is visible at left foreground. Overlaid diagonally across the image in large distressed cream and tan stencil lettering are the words 'GANG' (upper left) and 'ARREST' (lower right, crossing the image at an angle). A dark banner across the top right carries white serif text 'MS-13' with 'La Mara Salvatrucha' beneath it. A semi-transparent dark-red box at lower left contains the name in bold white, 'Cesar Lopez-Larios', followed by a bulleted charge list: 'Material support to terrorists; Financing terrorism; Narco-terrorism; Acts of terrorism.' The DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at lower right.
notable_text: GANG ARREST; MS-13 La Mara Salvatrucha; Cesar Lopez-Larios; Material support to terrorists; Financing terrorism; Narco-terrorism; Acts of terrorism
